hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Manatee in the wild
hero.caption: The Manatee is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Manatee navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Manatee finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Manatee.

baby.fileTitle: File:Manatee trichechus manatus latirostris close up underwater photo.jpg
baby.alt: A young or baby Manatee showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Manatees must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Manatees interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Manatees interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Manatee traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Manatee
size.caption: The size of a Manatee can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Manatee's body.
